title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to the three generations of sequencing:
First (Sanger) and Second (Massively Parallel) Generations of Sequencing.
Examples. Comparative overview of the available platforms: Illumina,
Roche, Applied Biosystems, Principles, Advantages, and Challenges

title: Module 2
content:
Third (Single Molecule Real Time) Generation of Sequencing.
Examples. Comparative overview of the available platforms: Helicos
Biosciences, Oxford (Nanopore), Pacific BioSciences - Principles,
Advantages and Challenges. Overview of the three generations of
sequencing

title: Module 3
content:
Applications of NGS:
Enrichment libraries II: ChIP and ATAC sequencing, Hi-C Sequencing –
Molecular
Principles
and
Approaches
for
Enrichment
(capture,
immunoprecipitation, DNA crosslinking). Single Cell Sequencing
Microbiome – sequencing, analysis, data mining

title: Module 4
content:
Basics of Script-writing and programming for NGS data analysis Intro to
data analysis - Bulk and Single-cell RNA sequencing analysis: Part1
Alignment, Assembly, Abundance estimation, Splice Isoforms Assessment.
Bulk and Single-cell RNA sequencing analysis: Variation calls, Variation
Annotation
